It was supposed to be a normal day - well, as normal as it gets when your girlfriend is a spider-person who spends her nights swinging through the city, dealing out and fucking capitalism. But then you got hurt. Bad. And suddenly, Zara found herself in the middle of a clusterfuck involving timelines, destinies, and a bunch of self-righteous spider-people telling her to let the love of her life die.
